Beille 4pc Stemless Wine Glasses Kitchen Decor Entertaining Essentials, 21oz

Sip in style with Beille’s Set of Four Stemless Wine Glasses, made right here in the USA.

Featuring a generous 21oz volume, these stemless wine glasses are ideal for reds, whites, and everything in between, making them perfect for both casual sips or sophisticated and more formal gatherings. Whether you're enjoying a quiet evening at home or hosting a large dinner party, our wine glasses are crafted with quality in mind for an enjoyable drinking experience with each and every use.

Key Features

  • STEMLESS WINE GLASSES: Featuring a generous 21oz volume, dishwasher safe, highly versatile and made in the USA, these stemless wine glasses from Beille can do it all, and will quickly become a staple in any kitchen
  • VERSATILE USE: Ideal for reds, whites, and everything in between, these wine glasses are perfect for everyday use and yet, can seamlessly transition for more sophisticated gatherings or formal settings; also suitable for juice, water, cocktails and more
  • STYLISH AND CLASSIC DESIGN: Stemless structure provides durability and stability; a not to thin top is complemented by a sturdy base that provides and weight and comfort when holding and sipping
  • DISHWASHER SAFE: Top rack dish washer safe for quick and easy clean up
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 5 x 3.5 inches; Set Weight: 2.06lbs; Material: Glass

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BLE-IUXL9M0D
  • UPC: 810131705404
  • Color: Clear

The durable glass ensures a crystal clear view of your favorite wine, while the stemless structure provides stability and comfort when holding and sipping. Stemless wine glasses have a reputation of being too delicate, however, that’s not the case here! A not to thin top, complemented by sturdy base, provides weight, comfort and a noticeable balance when in hand.

Elevate your wine experience with this set of four premium stemless wine glasses from Beille. The classic design makes them great to pair with other glassware and will quickly become a staple in any kitchen.

Dishwasher Safe.

Sold as a set of four.
